---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem statement

What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how? Be specific — "it would be nice" is not a problem statement.

## Proposed solution

What should the app do? Describe the behaviour from the user's perspective.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why did you rule them out?

## Relevant phase

Which phase of the implementation plan does this relate to? (P0–P6, or "post-launch")

Reference: [Notion implementation plan](https://www.notion.so/321f25b851a181f4ba16f61f8ff646a2)

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, references to similar features in other tools, or links to related issues.
